seo.title: Building RAG Pipeline with CrewAI + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build rag pipeline with CrewAI + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building a RAG Pipeline with CrewAI enables multi-agent collaboration for document retrieval, context assembly, and LLM synthesis, powering intelligent knowledge retrieval systems. Guardrails are essential to prevent agent delegation loops, hallucinated tool outputs, task drift, and inconsistent quality that undermine reliability in high-stakes RAG applications. Vex integration ensures source faithfulness, hallucination detection, and citation accuracy across the crew.

architectureOverview.heading: RAG Pipeline Architecture with CrewAI
architectureOverview.description:
The RAG Pipeline with CrewAI orchestrates specialized agents: a Retriever Agent performs vector search on document embeddings to fetch relevant chunks; a Context Assembler Agent synthesizes and ranks retrieved contexts for relevance; a Synthesizer Agent generates responses with source attribution; and a Validator Agent checks for hallucinations and citation accuracy. Tasks flow sequentially with tool delegation, where agents invoke vector stores (e.g., Chroma, Pinecone) and LLMs via CrewAI's task framework.

This multi-agent design excels at complex retrieval but risks propagation of errors—hallucinated retrievals cascade through synthesis, while task drift causes agents to deviate from source-grounded objectives. Vex callbacks intercept outputs at each task boundary for verification.

The architecture scales to enterprise document bases, with agents configurable for domain-specific LLMs and embedding models.

risks.name: Agent delegation loops between crew members
risks.description: Retriever and Assembler agents repeatedly delegate incomplete contexts, stalling the pipeline
risks.mitigation: Vex task callbacks enforce delegation limits and output completeness checks

risks.name: Hallucinated tool outputs passed between agents
risks.description: Vector search tools return irrelevant chunks hallucinated as relevant, poisoning synthesis
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies retrieval relevance before context assembly with semantic similarity thresholds

risks.name: Task drift when agents reinterpret objectives
risks.description: Synthesizer Agent drifts from source-grounded response to opinionated generation
risks.mitigation: Vex faithfulness checks ensure generated text stays within retrieved context bounds

risks.name: Inconsistent output quality across crew roles
risks.description: Validator Agent outputs vary in hallucination detection rigor across runs
risks.mitigation: Vex standardizes verification with consistent LLM judges and scoring rubrics

implementation.title: CrewAI RAG Crew Setup
implementation.description: Define specialized agents and sequential tasks for the RAG pipeline with vector store tools
implementation.code:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai_tools import ChromaDBSearchTool
from langchain_chroma import Chroma

# Vector store setup
vectorstore = Chroma.from_documents(documents, embedding_model)
search_tool = ChromaDBSearchTool(chroma_db=vectorstore)

retriever = Agent(
    role='Retriever',
    goal='Fetch most relevant document chunks via vector search',
    backstory='Expert in semantic search and retrieval',
    tools=[search_tool],
    verbose=True
)

assembler = Agent(
    role='Context Assembler',
    goal='Rank and synthesize retrieved contexts for relevance',
    backstory='Information synthesis specialist',
    verbose=True
)

synthesizer = Agent(
    role='Synthesizer',
    goal='Generate cited responses grounded in provided context',
    backstory='Technical writing expert',
    verbose=True
)

task1 = Task(description='Retrieve top 5 chunks for: {query}', agent=retriever)
task2 = Task(description='Assemble relevant context from: {context_chunks}', agent=assembler, context=[task1])
task3 = Task(description='Synthesize answer with citations from: {assembled_context}', agent=synthesizer, context=[task2])

rag_crew = Crew(agents=[retriever, assembler, synthesizer], tasks=[task1, task2, task3], verbose=2)

implementation.title: RAG Vector Store Integration
implementation.description: Configure ChromaDB with embeddings for document retrieval in CrewAI tools
implementation.code:
from langchain_openai import OpenAIEmbeddings
from langchain.text_splitter import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
from langchain_chroma import Chroma
from langchain.document_loaders import TextLoader

loader = TextLoader('documents/knowledge_base.txt')
documents = loader.load()
text_splitter = RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size=1000, chunk_overlap=200)
chunks = text_splitter.split_documents(documents)

embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings()
vectorstore = Chroma.from_documents(chunks, embeddings, persist_directory='./rag_db')

# Export as CrewAI tool
search_tool = ChromaDBSearchTool.from_chroma(
    chroma=vectorstore,
    k=5
)

implementation.title: Agent Task with Citation Tracking
implementation.description: Synthesizer task enforces source attribution with structured output format
implementation.code:
synthesizer_task = Task(
    description="""Answer the query using ONLY the provided context.
    Format response as:
    ANSWER: [your response]
    SOURCES: [chunk_id: relevance_score pairs]
    Query: {query}
    Context: {context}""",
    agent=synthesizer,
    context=[assembler_task],
    output_format="structured",
    expected_output="Answer with verifiable citations"
)

result = rag_crew.kickoff(inputs={'query': 'What is the company revenue model?'})

implementation.title: Pipeline Execution and Output Parsing
implementation.description: Execute crew and parse structured RAG outputs with source attribution

vexIntegration.title: Vex Callback on Retriever Task
vexIntegration.description: Verify retrieval relevance before passing to assembler agent
vexIntegration.code:
from vex_sdk import Vex
from crewai import Task

vex = Vex(api_key='your-vex-key')

def vex_retrieval_check(output, context):
    verdict = vex.verify(
        claim=output,
        context=context,
        checks=[
            'source_faithfulness',
            'context_relevance',
            {'name': 'semantic_similarity', 'threshold': 0.8}
        ]
    )
    return verdict.passed

retriever_task = Task(
    description='Retrieve relevant chunks...',
    agent=retriever,
    context=[user_query_task],
    output_callback=lambda output, ctx: vex_retrieval_check(output, ctx['query'])
)

vexIntegration.title: Vex Hallucination Guard on Synthesizer
vexIntegration.description: Detect hallucinations and enforce context faithfulness in final generation

vexIntegration.title: Crew-Wide Vex Monitoring Middleware
vexIntegration.description: Global callback intercepts all agent outputs for consistent verification

cta.heading: Secure Your CrewAI RAG Pipeline
cta.description: Install Vex with `pip install vex-sdk` and add task callbacks to productionize reliable multi-agent RAG today.
